meta.listDescription: Manage the standardized package plans, their availability, and global package settings.
meta.detailDescription: Inspect and edit safe display fields for a standardized package plan.
meta.settingsDescription: Manage the global package feature switches for patient-facing package purchases.

page.title: Package plans
page.description: Standardized plans are managed centrally and apply across the platform.

notice.heading: Important boundary
notice.note: Disabling a plan only affects new quotes and new purchases. Existing purchases and linked sessions stay valid.

list.tableNote: These are the three platform-wide package tiers available to patients.

statusHint.active: Visible to public package quotes and purchases.
statusHint.inactive: Hidden from public package quotes and purchases.

feedback.enableError: Could not enable the plan right now.
feedback.disableError: Could not disable the plan right now.

settings.title: Feature switches
settings.description: These settings control whether the package feature is visible and whether patients can buy packages.
settings.note: Use these switches with care. Disabling purchases blocks new package checkouts, but it does not change existing purchases.

fields.packagesEnabledNote: Controls whether the standardized package feature is available in the platform UI and APIs.
fields.packagesPurchaseEnabledNote: Controls whether patients can start new package purchases.

feedback.saveError: Could not update package settings right now.

detail.description: Review the immutable plan rules and update only the safe display fields.

summary.purchaseCountHint: How many package purchases used this plan

sections.overviewNote: The code, session count, and discount are read-only for this standardized package tier.

fields.title: Title
fields.isActiveNote: Toggles whether the plan is available for new quotes and purchases.

actions.heading: Plan actions
actions.activeNote: This plan is active and available for new quotes and purchases.
actions.inactiveNote: This plan is inactive and hidden from new public quotes and purchases.

modal.title: Update safe display fields
modal.description: You can update the title, description, sort order, and active state. The tier code, session count, and discount stay immutable.

enable.title: Enable this package plan?
enable.note: Enabling makes this plan available again for new public quotes and purchases.
enable.body: This will not change historical package purchases or linked sessions.

disable.title: Disable this package plan?
disable.note: Disabling hides this plan from new public quotes and purchases.
disable.body: Existing package purchases remain valid and are not removed.

feedback.updateError: Could not update the package plan right now.
feedback.enableError: Could not enable the package plan right now.
feedback.disableError: Could not disable the package plan right now.

items.quotes: Disabled plans are rejected by new public quotes.
items.purchases: Disabled plans are rejected by new purchases.
items.history: Existing purchases, payments, and linked sessions remain unchanged.

error.heading: Package plans are not available right now
error.note: Could not load the package plans surface.

notFound.heading: Package plan was not found
notFound.note: We could not find a standardized package plan with this code.

empty.heading: No package plans found
empty.note: The backend returned no standardized package plans. There should normally be three plans.
